task_description: Create a Telegram bot that lets users input their crush's name, generates a 'Do you love me?' HTML file with that name, and when the crush clicks Yes (redirected to bot), generates a 'Said Yes' scrapbook card image and sends it back to the original user. Deploy on Railway.

verification.summary: pip install succeeds, python import succeeds, no InlineKeyboard usage, ReplyKeyboardMarkup used, all files exist with correct content.
